‏034 - - AI Creator Course AI Video Creation 034 - VEO3 _ The most advanced video generator online 🔗 Links: • VEO 3 on fal.ai - • VEO 3 directly on google flow 📝 Info: VEO3 | The most advanced video generator online AI Video Creation VEO 3 on fal.ai - VEO 3 directly on google flow: Veo 3 Prompt Guide: 1. Subject Defines the main focus or character of your video, describing their appearance, traits, and any defining visual details so the AI knows exactly what to center the scene around. 2. Action Explains what the subject is doing in the scene, specifying movement, gestures, or interactions to bring life and purpose to the shot. 3. Environment Describes the surrounding setting or background, providing context that supports the mood, story, or style of the scene. 4. Audio Outlines the soundscape, including music, sound effects, and ambient noise, to help convey atmosphere and emotional tone. 5. ⬇️ (See next message)

‏029 - - AI Creator Course AI Content Planning & Writing 029 - How to Write Profitable Ads With AI 📝 Info: How to Write Profitable Ads With AI AI Content Planning & Writing AI Ad Writing Prep Worksheet Use this fill-in-the-blank template to organize your offer details and feed them into ChatGPT to generate high-converting, emotionally resonant ads. 1. What is the name of your product or service? Content Accelerator Bootcamp 1. What transformation does your offer provide? Go from overwhelmed new creator to confident content strategist in 30 days. 2. Who is your ideal client? Busy professionals in their 30s to 50s who want to launch a digital side business but feel overwhelmed by tech and content creation. 3. What specific problems does your audience struggle with? They feel stuck, burned out, and confused by conflicting advice online. 4. What have they tried before that didn’t work? ⬇️ (See next message)

Personalization settings ChatGPT moved the customization and personalization settings. It will either be in the top right or bottom left of your screen. Just click on your profile and you'll see options to customize and personalize chatGPT. 11/25 Update! Small UI Change 👇 For some users, the "canvas", "create image", and other options will be revealed when you click the (+) button on the left side of your chatGPT prompt bar. If you then hover over "more" the canvas option will appear. 10/25 Update! ChatGPT 5.0 is out 👇 Overall, 5.0 is an improvement on many things within chatGPT but it doesn't change how you use GPT or how the AI works. ⬇️ (See next message)

The image creation model 📝 Info: Create AI Youtube Thumbnails AI Youtube Thumbnails IMPORTANT NOTE: If you are only getting one image each time despite changing the setting to get multiple images, make sure you don't have "/stream" in the site url. Delete that and it will create as many images as you request. There are two Fal.ai models involved in this process: 1. The training model: 2. The image creation model: Once you've trained your Ai model, just click the "run inference" button next to the finished lora and it will bring you right to the image creation model and it will have your lora code loaded up and ready to go. (this is all explained in the previous video in the course.

‏008 - - AI Creator Course AI Image Generation 008 - ChatGPT Image Generation 📝 Info: ChatGPT Image Generation AI Image Generation 12/25 Updates! Some buttons have moved places ChatGPT still works exactly the same, but they updated the layout to move some buttons around. Now if you click the "plus" (+) button next to the prompt bar, you will see options for creating an image along with several other options as well. Also, inpainting still exists, you just need to click on the image to bring it up full screen, and then in the top right of the screen the inpainting button is there labelled as "select area".
